name: @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/monorepo
description: monorepo with grid, panel, drag packages, and other utilities for wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux

scripts.build:validator-targets: yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/utils build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/style-tree build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/box build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/observe-drag build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/ticker-forest build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/button build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/toolbar build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/root-container build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/grid build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/resizer build && yarn workspace @wonderlandlabs-pixi-ux/window build
scripts.publishAll: yarn workspaces foreach -A --no-private -t npm publish --access public
